message.content:
Subject: Issue in My Apartment - Request for Repair

Dear [Landlord's Name],

I hope this message finds you well. I'm writing to report a maintenance issue in my apartment at [Your Address]. The problem is [briefly describe the issue, e.g., "a leak in the kitchen faucet" or "a malfunctioning heating unit"], which has recently become noticeable.

I'd appreciate it if you could arrange for someone to take a look and address it at your earliest convenience. Please let me know a suitable time or if you need any additional details from me.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Best regards,  
[Your Name]  
[Your Phone Number]  
[Your Apartment Number, if applicable]
